news.headline: EU looks at tapping €93 bln in unspent COVID recovery funds for defence - FT
Perion Network Ltd. (NASDAQ and TASE: PERI) reported Q4 and FY 2024 results, showing growth in DOOH, CTV, and Retail Media, ended Dec 31, 2024.
news.summary: Perion Network Ltd., a prominent player in cutting-edge technology addressing the challenges in contemporary advertising, revealed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and the entire year concluding on December 31, 2024. The noteworthy numbers from the report include a surge in the Digital Out-of-Home (DOOH) and Connected TV (CTV) segments, alongside growth in the Retail Media domain. The CEO expressed optimism at the company's robust fourth quarter outcomes, emphasizing the sustained expansion in key channels and verticals. Perion Network Ltd. is listed on the NASDAQ and TASE exchanges under the ticker symbol PERI.

news.headline: Extreme Networks introduces Platform ONE for MSPs, featuring AI-driven architecture and consumption-based billing for cost savings.
news.summary: Extreme Networks, Inc., a prominent player in AI-driven networking automation (Nasdaq: EXTR), revealed the imminent launch of Extreme Platform ONE™ tailored for Managed Service Providers (MSPs). This innovative platform operates on an exclusive AI-oriented multi-tenant structure, incorporating consumption-based billing and poolable licensing. Such a setup empowers MSPs with exceptional adaptability, ease of use, and financial efficiencies, facilitating seamless management of clients on a large scale. With Extreme's MSP program, providers are granted unparalleled capabilities.

news.headline: Keepit, a cloud backup vendor, sees exceptional growth in a challenging market, with record revenue boost in 2024.
news.summary: Denmark-based Keepit, a leading provider of cloud backup and recovery solutions for safeguarding SaaS data, has reported substantial growth and advancements, solidifying its place as a prominent player in the SaaS data protection sector. Throughout the year, the company has seen notable achievements such as record revenue increase, strategic expansions, and recognition from the industry. Keepit attributes its success to ongoing communication with customers, partners, and the community, highlighting its commitment to innovation and customer service.

news.headline: Hamilton Zanze sponsors acquisition of 200-home Arnada Pointe in Vancouver, Wash. - a garden-style apartment community.
news.summary: A garden-style apartment complex in Vancouver, Washington with 200 homes has recently been featured. The purchase of Arnada Pointe was sponsored by Hamilton Zanze, a prominent San Francisco-based multifamily real estate investment firm. The news was disclosed on February 19, 2025.

news.headline: Malware targeting Apple macOS devices can now steal cryptocurrency, record screens, and manipulate Bitcoin addresses.
news.summary: The newest XCSSET update includes the capability to capture a target's screen and manipulate the Bitcoin addresses displayed in their web browser.

news.headline: China Commerce Minister: China is strongly dissatisfied with US tariffs on Chinese goods.
Appian reports FY 2024 financial results: Cloud subscription revenue rose 21% YoY to $368.0 million.
news.summary: Appian has reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The company saw a significant increase in its cloud subscription revenue, which amounted to $368.0 million for the fiscal year. This represented a notable uptick of 21% compared to the previous year.

news.headline: Gotcha Covered opens third location in Fort Wayne, Indiana to offer custom window treatment solutions; expanding its reach in US and Canada.
news.summary: Brandon Shane is aiming to offer motivating window treatment choices with the launch of a new store in Fort Wayne. Gotcha Covered, a prominent provider of custom window treatment consulting services in the U.S. and Canada, has revealed the establishment of its third location in Fort Wayne, Indiana on February 19, 2025. This expansion underscores the company's commitment to providing high-quality window treatment solutions to customers, further solidifying its position as an industry leader.

news.headline: MAC Copper Limited to release updated Resource and Reserve Statement on Feb 24, 2025. ARBN 671 963 198. News includes 2024 Annual Financial Statements.
news.summary: A private limited company, MAC Copper Limited ARBN 671 963 198 (NYSE: MTAL; ASX: MAC), based in St. Helier, Jersey, will be unveiling its revised Resource and Reserve Statement dated December 31, 2024 on Monday, February 24, 2025. This disclosure is scheduled to occur before the opening of the market in New York or after the close of the market in Sydney. Alongside this statement, the company will also publish its financial results for the year 2024.

news.headline: Hirschbach Motor Lines partners with Hyperscience for digital transformation, using AI to automate document processing.
news.summary: Hyperscience, a leading company in hyperautomation and enterprise AI infrastructure software, recently revealed that Hirschbach Motor Lines, a prominent carrier with over 80 years of experience in providing transportation solutions, has integrated Hyperscience into its digital transformation roadmap. As a successful and rapidly expanding business, Hirschbach opted for Hyperscience's enterprise AI to streamline document processing.

news.headline: The Juice acquires AudiencePlus to boost B2B marketing, merging teams and products. The Juice connects B2B marketers with over 100,000 professionals.
news.summary: An Indianapolis B2B content platform, The Juice, has confirmed its acquisition of audience marketing platform AudiencePlus, combining teams and products. Established by High Alpha in 2021 and supported by Ground Game Ventures, The Juice links B2B marketers with a network of 100,000+ B2B professionals to enhance content interaction. AudiencePlus, also a High Alpha portfolio company, was brought under The Juice's umbrella. The acquisition aims to strengthen their market presence and improve content delivery for both brands and consumers.

news.headline: Riley, an all-in-one parenting platform, raises $3.1M in seed funding for app supporting early parenthood.
news.summary: A technology startup in San Francisco, Riley, unveiled the closure of $3.1 million in seed funding and the introduction of a beta program for its parenting app. The app, designed to aid early parenthood, integrates AI technology and expert advice based on research findings to provide proactive and instantaneous assistance for parents. True Ventures spearheaded the funding round, with Flybridge and Next Wave NYC joining in as investors. Lindsay Kaplan, a prominent figure, also participated in the investment.

news.headline: China: We're willing to strengthen talks with US on policies.
Mantra Finance obtains Dubai crypto license to broaden DeFi, RWA solutions for institutional investors in UAE, MENA.
news.summary: Mantra Finance recently obtained a VASP license in Dubai, enhancing its offerings of DeFi and RWA tokenization services for professional investors in the UAE and MENA areas.

news.headline: Echo Water and Truemed team up to allow Echo Flask purchase using pre-tax HSA/FSA funds, offering savings of 30-40%.
news.summary: A partnership has been announced between Echo and Truemed in Salt Lake City, enabling the Echo Flask to qualify for pre-tax HSA/FSA payments. This collaboration offers customers the opportunity to save between 30% to 40% on their purchases.

news.headline: "Get insider tips on accessing private credit opportunities with our investor guide. #PrivateCredit #Investing"
Anetac launches first User Group to promote cross-industry collaboration in identity security; includes members from finance, healthcare, retail sectors.
news.summary: Anetac, a top player in safeguarding businesses against identity-related risks in hybrid settings, unveiled its inaugural Anetac User Group in Los Altos, California. This development showcases a crucial step in the firm's dedication to enhancing identity security measures through cooperative innovation. The group convened for the first time on February 13, with participation from security experts in finance, healthcare, retail, and critical infrastructure industries. This event signifies a key stride in fostering industry collaboration and knowledge exchange among professionals focused on protecting identities.

news.headline: Altria reaffirms 2025 full-year earnings guidance at the Consumer Analyst Group of New York Conference.
news.summary: Altria recently participated in the Consumer Analyst Group of New York conference, where they reaffirmed their full-year earnings guidance for 2025. The company, based in Richmond, Virginia, discussed their financial outlook and reiterated their commitment to achieving their earnings targets. This reaffirmation provides investors with assurance regarding Altria's projected financial performance in 2025. It signals the company's confidence in meeting its financial goals and maintaining stability in the coming years.

news.headline: Microwave transmission equipment market to reach US$ 8.75 billion by 2035, with 4.5% growth rate, driven by demand for high-speed data networks and 5G rollout, East Asia leading with 35.7% market share.
news.summary: A recent study by Fact.MR projects that the global microwave transmission equipment market will reach $5.65 billion in 2025 and is expected to reach $8.75 billion by 2035. The rise is driven by the push for energy-efficient systems adhering to global sustainability standards, with green microwave equipment gaining popularity. Microwave equipment is preferred over fiber-optic systems due to lower costs in maintenance and installation, particularly in areas with challenging terrain. The demand for these equipment is further boosted by the need for high-capacity data transmission networks driven by live streaming, video-on-demand, and high-definition TV services. East Asia leads the market with 35.7% global market share in 2025, with China and Japan's communication infrastructure projects being key factors. North America follows due to the need for high-speed connections and the emphasis on 5G and IoT applications. The market is forecasted to grow at a 4.5% CAGR from 2025 to 2035, with full-indoor equipment expected to see a 5.5% CAGR.

news.headline: Custodial workers at 2 Calgary school districts to strike, 800 CBE and 350 CCSD employees vote 94% in favor.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, the union representing custodial and maintenance workers at the Calgary Board of Education (CBE) and the Calgary Catholic School District (CCSD) is set to issue a 72-hour strike notice. Approximately 800 employees at the CBE, who are part of CUPE Local 40, voted with a 94.5% majority in favor of a strike last week. Additionally, 350 employees at CCSD, members of CUPE Local 520, also voted in favor of a strike with a 94% majority. CUPE Alberta President Rory Gill mentioned that the union plans to commence the strike on Monday morning.

news.headline: Report from Validated Insights shows OPM market shifting, with fee-for-service eclipsing revenue-share arrangements.
news.summary: In Chicago, a recent report from Validated Insights highlights a shift in the market for online program managers (OPM). The report indicates that fee-for-service arrangements are gaining momentum, surpassing revenue-share agreements. This data signifies a significant change in the industry landscape, with fee-for-service models becoming more prevalent. This trend is expected to have a notable impact on the market moving forward.

news.headline: VersaBank to report Q1 fiscal 2025 results on March 5, 2025, conference call/webcast at 9:00 a.m. ET. TSX: VBNK, NASDAQ: VBNK.
news.summary: VersaBank, a prominent financial institution (TSX: VBNK) (NASDAQ: VBNK), is set to reveal its first quarter fiscal 2025 results on March 5, 2025, at 7:00 a.m. ET. The bank, headquartered in London, ON, will not only disclose its financial performance for this period but also conduct a conference call to provide insights and discuss further details. This important event will offer stakeholders and investors a comprehensive overview of the bank's standing during the initial quarter of the fiscal year.

news.headline: SolarEdge reports Q4 2024 earnings, returning to positive free cash flow. CEO cites promising future opportunities.
news.summary: Headquartered in Milpitas, California, SolarEdge Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: SEDG), a prominent player in smart energy solutions, revealed its financial performance for Q4 2024 and the full year concluding on December 31, 2024. CEO Shuki Nir expressed optimism about the future prospects for SolarEdge, stating, "Exciting opportunities lie ahead for us." The company's positive free cash flow in Q4 marks a significant milestone in their turnaround journey. With a focus on growth, SolarEdge anticipates further progress in this area.

news.headline: Motus acquires Everlance to enhance services for companies of all sizes, boosting productivity; announced on Feb. 19, 2025.
news.summary: Motus has broadened its services by acquiring a new company, enhancing its ability to help businesses of various scales in optimizing spending, managing risks, and boosting productivity. The acquisition, announced on February 19, 2025 in Boston, reinforces Motus' position as a top player in vehicle reimbursement and risk management solutions. This strategic move will benefit companies ranging from large corporations to individual entrepreneurs.

news.headline: Altair launches Altair® HyperWorks® 2025, enabling a zero-prototype world - Feb. 19, 2025 /PRNewswire - Nasdaq: ALTR.
news.summary: Altair, a global leader in computational intelligence, is excited to introduce Altair® HyperWorks® 2025, packed with new features making it possible to operate in a zero-prototype environment. Released on February 19, 2025, this software is designed to revolutionize design and simulation. Altair, listed on Nasdaq as ALTR, is bringing cutting-edge technology to the market with this new release.

news.headline: SysAid sees productivity gains with AI in ITSM; Recognized in 2025 Gartner Innovation Guide. Leading provider of Service Management solutions.
news.summary: SysAid, a prominent Enterprise and IT Service Management solutions provider, has been acknowledged in the 2025 Gartner® Innovation Guide for Generative AI Technologies. The company, based in Toronto, is excited to share that it has been identified as one of the Emerging Leaders in this year's guide. This recognition demonstrates SysAid's commitment to innovation and cutting-edge technologies in the industry. It signifies their position as a significant player in the market.

news.headline: New media agency Mile Marker forms from Cage Point & PlusMedia merger. Secures AOR assignments from Bridges Consumer Healthcare, Carlin Consumer Health, and Hiscox USA.
news.summary: A recently established independent media agency known for its candid approach, resulting from the fusion of Cage Point and PlusMedia, has successfully obtained Agency of Record (AOR) contracts from Bridges Consumer Healthcare LLC, Carlin Consumer Health, and Hiscox USA, a business insurance entity. The agency is based in New York and the development was disclosed on February 19, 2025, via PRNewswire.

news.headline: Republic Business Credit hires Chris Costello as Senior Vice President, Underwriter, bringing decades of experience in Asset Based lending.
news.summary: Republic Business Credit has appointed Chris Costello as Senior Vice President of Underwriting, effective February 19, 2025. With years of experience in Asset Based lending, Costello will be a valuable addition to the underwriting team at Republic Business Credit in New Orleans. This move reflects the company's commitment to strengthening its underwriting capabilities.

news.headline: Energy exchange ElectronX raises $10M funding led by Systemiq Capital; J. Christopher Giancarlo named strategic adviser.
news.summary: In a recent funding round led by climate tech fund Systemiq Capital, ElectronX, a new energy exchange, secured investment from global energy corporate funds Equinor Ventures and Shell Ventures. Taking place in Chicago on Feb. 19, 2025, this strategic round has brought in significant financial support to aid in accelerating the transition of the U.S. grid to renewable energy sources.

news.headline: Maxwell Healthcare Associates' nanaBEREAVEMENT product awarded "CHAP Verified" status by Community Health Accreditation Partner.
news.summary: In Shoreview, Minnesota on February 19, 2025, Maxwell Healthcare Associates (MHA) revealed that their tech-driven bereavement support system, nanaBEREAVEMENT, has obtained the prestigious "CHAP Verified" seal from the Community Health Accreditation Partner (CHAP). This recognition signifies nanaBEREAVEMENT's adherence to high standards in the industry.

news.headline: CalciMedica to present at 30th AKI & CRRT Conference in 2025; advancing CRAC channel therapies.
news.summary: In La Jolla, California on February 19, 2025, CalciMedica Inc., also known as CalciMedica, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, announced their focus on developing innovative therapies targeting calcium release-activated calcium (CRAC) channels for acute and chronic inflammatory conditions. The company, listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol CALC, is dedicated to advancing treatments in this area.

news.headline: System Innovation Group gets $2.8M contract for network extension for a Southeast US Utility. #communications #services
news.summary: In Melbourne, Florida on February 19, 2025, System Innovation Group, a top provider of communications solutions, declared that they have secured a contract extension to provide network as a service support to a Utility company based in the Southeastern United States. This contract signifies an important step for the company's growth in this sector, further solidifying their position in the market.

news.headline: Positive results from study on ASC30 oral tablet: 6.3% body weight reduction in cohort 2 after 28 days of treatment.
news.summary: A new ASC30 oral once-daily tablet showed a promising 6.3% average decrease in body weight compared to baseline after 28 days of treatment in the second multiple ascending dose (MAD) cohort. This cohort underwent weekly titrations increasing the dosage from 2 mg to 10 mg, then 20 mg, and finally 40 mg. Additionally, the same tablet exhibited a 4.3% average body weight reduction.

news.headline: Darktrace's 2024 report shows MaaS threats up to 57%, a 17% increase from H1 2024. Spear phishing accounts for 38% of attacks. Evasion tactics rise.
news.summary: In the present scenario, Malware-as-a-Service (MaaS) accounts for the detection of 57% of threats, which is a notable escalation of 17% compared to the previous year. The complexity of phishing assaults is on an upward trend, as spear phishing now constitutes 38% of these attacks. There is a growing trend among threat actors to exploit edge device vulnerabilities in order to enhance their evasion tactics.

news.headline: European consumers show enthusiasm for Revyve yeast protein egg-replacers, survey by Revyve, B.V. reports.
news.summary: In France, the UK, and Germany, yeast proteins are gaining popularity for their health benefits, sustainability, and flexibility. A recent study conducted by Revyve, B.V. in WAGENINGEN, Netherlands, unveiled favorable European perceptions towards yeast protein's potential advantages. Published on Feb. 19, 2025, the findings indicate a growing interest in yeast protein among consumers in these countries.

news.headline: FDA accepts PTC Therapeutics' Vatiquinone NDA for Friedreich's Ataxia in children and adults, with PDUFA target action date of Aug. 19, 2025.
news.summary: PTC Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: PTCT), based in Warren, N.J., revealed that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has accepted the New Drug Application (NDA) for vatiquinone. The PDUFA target action date has been set for Aug. 19, 2025. This medication is intended for the treatment of a certain condition.

news.headline: FastrackCE, a leading online insurance CE provider, celebrates 25 years of excellence across 34 states.
news.summary: Celebrating its 25th anniversary, FastrackCE, a top provider of online insurance continuing education, has been a pioneer in the industry for the past 25 years. The company, based in Fairfield, California, serves professionals in 34 states. FastrackCE has been a leader in innovation and has remained a trusted source for online continuing education solutions for insurance professionals.

news.headline: Terry Campbell named CEO, Alexander De Bock CFO of combined ABC Technologies & TI Fluid Systems; Hans Dieltjens steps down.
news.summary: After the acquisition of ABC Technologies, Terry Campbell is set to take over as the President and Chief Executive Officer, while Alexander De Bock will assume the role of Chief Financial Officer. The current President and Chief Executive Officer of TI Fluid Systems, Hans Dieltjens, will step down as a result of the acquisition.

news.headline: Analog Devices announces Q1 2025 revenue surpassing $2.4 billion, growth in key sectors, $3.8B cash flow. Dividend raised by 8%.
news.summary: A company reported revenue exceeding $2.4 billion, showing increased performance in Industrial, Automotive, and Communications sectors, along with double-digit growth in Consumer sector compared to the previous year. The operating cash flow stood at $3.8 billion, and free cash flow at $3.2 billion over the last twelve months. Additionally, the quarterly dividend was increased by 8%.

news.headline: EDEN to discuss HVAC trends, incentives, and technology at EPIC2025 with co-founder Josh Koplin. Industry insights shared.
news.summary: Josh Koplin, co-founder of the company, will be imparting valuable knowledge to HVAC professionals to help them succeed in an evolving industry. The event will take place in Seattle on February 19, 2025. EDEN, a cutting-edge digital sales enablement platform specializing in HVAC, will be the focus of the discussion aimed at equipping professionals with the tools they need. This event is particularly significant as the industry experiences rapid changes, impacting over 200,000 professionals nationwide.

news.headline: WELLSTAR announces two new management team members: Sarah Xu as VP of Growth Operations and Frank Seiferth as VP of Product.
news.summary: Wellstar, a company specializing in healthcare services, recently bolstered its management team with two significant hires. Sarah Xu has been appointed as Vice President of Growth Operations while Frank Seiferth has joined as Vice President of Product. Both individuals come with extensive experience in the industry and have held leadership roles at companies such as Google and Ambience. These additions aim to further drive growth and product innovation at Wellstar.

news.headline: Mary's Gone Crackers presents new packaging and pairings at Natural Products Expo West at Booth #5431.
news.summary: Explore Mary's Gone Crackers' fresh appearance and modern packaging at Booth #5431! Discover their latest offerings and enjoy expertly paired organic snacks at the event in RENO, Nev. on Feb. 19, 2025. Mary's Gone Crackers is known for their innovative approach to organic, gluten-free, and plant-based snacks.

news.headline: Weekly mortgage demand drops 6%, as homebuyers remain on the fence.
Immunocore will release Q4 and full year 2024 financial results on Feb 26, 2025. (Oxford, Penn., Maryland; Nasdaq: IMCR)
news.summary: Immunocore Holdings plc, a biotechnology company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol IMCR, is set to release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on February 26, 2025. The company is known for developing innovative immunomodulating medicines aimed at enhancing treatment outcomes for individuals battling cancer, infectious diseases, and autoimmune conditions. Based in Oxfordshire, England, along with offices in Conshohocken, Pennsylvania, and Gaithersburg, Maryland, the company focuses on delivering groundbreaking solutions to address pressing medical challenges. Stay tuned for the financial report to gain insights into Immunocore's performance during the specified period.

news.headline: Plymouth Industrial REIT promotes Anthony Saladino to President & CFO, effective immediately. 19, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE).
news.summary: In Boston on February 19, 2025, Plymouth Industrial REIT, Inc. (NYSE: PLYM) revealed the promotion of Anthony Saladino as the new President and Chief Financial Officer. The appointment is effective immediately, marking an important milestone for the Company.

news.headline: Premier American Uranium fast-tracks Cebolleta Project with SLR for Mineral Resource Update and Economic Assessment, saving over US$2.0M.
news.summary: Premier American Uranium Inc. (PUR) announced plans to advance its Cebolleta Uranium Project in New Mexico. The company has engaged SLR International Corporation to update the Mineral Resource Estimate (MRE) and complete a Preliminary Economic Assessment (PEA) per NI 43-101 standards. The goal is to achieve these milestones by early summer 2025, well ahead of schedule and at a reduced cost, saving over US$2.0M in anticipated expenses. This move aims to further secure the Project and reduce risks efficiently.

news.headline: BioCryst Pharmaceuticals (Nasdaq: BCRX) to present at upcoming investor conferences on Feb. 19, 2025.
news.summary: BioCryst Pharmaceuticals, Inc., headquartered in Research Triangle Park, North Carolina, disclosed on February 19, 2025, their intention to participate in upcoming conferences. The company, listed on Nasdaq as BCRX, will present at these events.

news.headline: Rapper Nelly to headline Kinexions 2025 in Austin, TX. Sold 21M+ albums and received multiple awards.
news.summary: Kinaxis® (TSX:KXS), a leading company in end-to-end supply chain orchestration, revealed that Nelly will be the headline performer at the Kinexions 2025 conference in Austin, Texas from March 31 to April 2. Nelly, a highly acclaimed rapper, has sold over 21 million albums and secured numerous Grammys and Billboard Music Awards. His debut album, Country Grammar, released in 2000, remains one of the best-selling albums in history.

news.headline: Lithium Ionic receives favorable report for Bandeira Lithium Project in Brazil from SEMAD, moving towards key milestone.
news.summary: Lithium Ionic Corp. has recently received positive news regarding its Bandeira Lithium Project in Minas Gerais. The State Department of Environment and Sustainable Development has issued a favorable technical report recommending the approval of the Company's Concomitant Environmental, Installation, and Operational License for the Project. This license, known as LAC or Licença Ambiental Concomitante, is crucial for the Project's development. The regulatory body in charge of environmental licensing in the state, SEMAD, has played a key role in this process. This milestone signifies progress for Lithium Ionic Corp., listed on TSXV as LTH, OTCQX as LTHCF, and FSE as H3N.
